description: Compile falling block/object prompts into gravity-driven rigid-body trajectories with support contact evidence.
physical_assumptions: Falling bodies have gravity and collision enabled.
The vertical coordinate is z-up in harness fallback artifacts.
A falling body should descend before support contact.
Objects should not float, teleport, or penetrate far below the support surface.
verifier_rules: Falling object z decreases over time.
No unsupported floating after gravity should act.
repair_suggestions: Enable gravity and collision on falling bodies.
Check coordinate system and initial height.
